query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_ativas_com_telefone 
FROM gestantes g
WHERE g.telefone IS NOT NULL AND g.telefone != ''
AND g.id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partosRealizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL);

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_ativas_sem_telefone
FROM gestantes g
WHERE (g.telefone IS NULL OR g.telefone = '')
AND g.id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partosRealizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL);

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_ativas_sem_telefone
FROM gestantes g
WHERE (g.telefone IS NULL OR g.telefone = '')
AND g.id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partosRealizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL);
